squads.name: Rift Walkers
squads.description: The default starting squad with balanced, straightforward mechs.

weapon.name: Titan Fist
weapon.targeting: Single adjacent tile
weapon.description: Punches an adjacent tile, dealing damage and pushing the target.

upgrades.name: Dash
upgrades.effect: Dash through tiles before punching (Dash Punch). Can kill enemies in path via collision.

weapon.name: Taurus Cannon
weapon.targeting: Fires projectile in a straight line, hits first target
weapon.description: Shoots a pushing projectile that deals damage and pushes the target backward.

weapon.name: Artemis Artillery
weapon.targeting: Lobs a projectile over terrain to target tile, pushes adjacent tiles
weapon.description: Artillery shot that damages target and pushes all adjacent tiles.

upgrades.name: Buildings Immune
upgrades.effect: This weapon will not damage Grid Buildings

squads.name: Rusting Hulks
squads.description: Smoke-based squad. Jet Mech creates smoke, Storm Generator damages enemies in smoke.

weapon.name: Aerial Bombs
weapon.targeting: Flies over a tile, damaging it and creating smoke on it
weapon.description: Flies to target tile, damaging and smoking the tile you fly over.

weapon.name: Rocket Artillery
weapon.targeting: Artillery shot that hits target and creates smoke behind the target
weapon.description: Fires a rocket that damages target and creates a smoke cloud behind it.

passive.name: Storm Generator
passive.effect: All enemies in Smoke take 1 damage at the end of enemy turn
passive.description: Passive ability that damages all enemies standing in smoke tiles.

weapon.name: Repulse
weapon.targeting: Pushes all adjacent tiles away from the mech
weapon.description: Pushes all adjacent tiles and shields self.

upgrades.name: +1 Damage
upgrades.effect: Deals 1 damage to all pushed tiles

upgrades.name: Shield Ally
upgrades.effect: Shields an adjacent ally instead of self

squads.name: Zenith Guard
squads.description: Laser/shield squad. High damage laser, charge attack, and shield/pull support.

weapon.name: Burst Beam
weapon.targeting: Piercing beam in a straight line. 3 damage at point blank, decreasing by 1 per tile (3-2-1-0).
weapon.description: Fires a piercing laser that hits all units in a line. Damage decreases with range.

weapon.name: Ramming Engines
weapon.targeting: Charges in a straight line, dealing damage and pushing the first target hit
weapon.description: Dashes forward, damaging target and pushing it. Takes 1 self-damage on hit.

weapon.name: Attraction Pulse
weapon.targeting: Fires projectile in a straight line, pulls target toward the mech
weapon.description: Pulls a target unit toward the mech. Can kill enemies by pulling them into the mech.

squads.name: Blitzkrieg
squads.description: Lightning chain and crowd control. Chains damage between adjacent units, grapples, and places boulders.

weapon.name: Electric Whip
weapon.targeting: Hits adjacent tile and chains through all connected units/objects (friends and foes). Chains through boulders.
weapon.description: Electric attack that chains through all adjacent connected units.

weapon.name: Grappling Hook
weapon.targeting: Fires hook in straight line, pulls target adjacent to mech
weapon.description: Pulls a target to a tile adjacent to the mech.

weapon.name: Rock Accelerator
weapon.targeting: Launches a boulder that damages target and pushes adjacent tiles. Boulder persists as a blocking object.
weapon.description: Throws a boulder that deals damage and creates a persistent rock on the tile.

upgrades.name: Pre-placed
upgrades.effect: Spawn a boulder near your deployment zone at battle start

squads.name: Steel Judoka
squads.description: Displacement squad. Throws, pushes, and pulls enemies into each other's attack lines.

passive.name: Vek Hormones
passive.effect: Enemies will attack other enemies if able. Flipped Vek target other Vek instead of buildings/mechs.

weapon.name: Vice Fist
weapon.targeting: Grabs adjacent unit and throws it 2 tiles over the mech to the opposite side
weapon.description: Throws an adjacent enemy to the opposite side. Requires open space behind mech.

weapon.name: Cluster Artillery
weapon.targeting: Hits target tile plus 4 adjacent tiles (cross pattern) for 1 damage each
weapon.description: Artillery that damages a cross-shaped area around the target.

weapon.name: Grav Well
weapon.targeting: Artillery weapon that pulls its target towards the mech
weapon.description: Pulls target unit towards the Gravity Mech. Can pull enemies into water/chasms or into each other for bump damage.

upgrades.name: Push
upgrades.effect: Pushes target one tile instead of pulling

squads.name: Flame Behemoths
squads.description: Fire-based squad. Sets tiles and enemies on fire for damage over time.

weapon.name: Flamethrower
weapon.targeting: Hits tiles in front of mech (1-3 tiles depending on upgrades), setting them on fire. Pushes targets.
weapon.description: Sets target tiles on fire and pushes. +2 bonus damage to already-burning targets.

upgrades.name: +1 Range
upgrades.effect: Extends flame range by another tile

weapon.name: Vulcan Artillery
weapon.targeting: Hits target and sets surrounding tiles on fire
weapon.description: Artillery that damages target and sets surrounding tiles on fire.

upgrades.name: Backburn
upgrades.effect: Creates fire behind the mech when firing

weapon.name: Teleporter
weapon.targeting: Swaps positions of the mech and a target unit within range (2-4 tiles depending on upgrades)
weapon.description: Teleports target unit, swapping its position with the mech.

squads.name: Frozen Titans
squads.description: Ice-based squad. Freezes enemies and redirects attacks with dual-directional cannon.

weapon.name: Spartan Shield
weapon.targeting: Hits adjacent tile, pushing target. Can generate shield.
weapon.description: Melee attack that damages and pushes. High base damage.

weapon.name: Janus Cannon
weapon.targeting: Fires in BOTH directions simultaneously (front and back). Hits all units in both lines.
weapon.description: Shoots in two opposite directions, hitting all targets in both lines.

upgrades.name: +1 Damage
upgrades.effect: Increases damage to 2 in both directions

upgrades.name: +1 Damage
upgrades.effect: Increases damage to 3 in both directions

weapon.name: Cryo-Launcher
weapon.targeting: Freezes the target tile and the mech itself
weapon.description: Fires a cryo projectile that freezes the target. Also freezes the Ice Mech.

upgrades.name: +1 Damage
upgrades.effect: Deals 1 damage to target before freezing

squads.name: Hazardous Mechs
squads.description: Self-damaging squad with high damage output and healing mechanics.

weapon.name: Hydraulic Legs
weapon.targeting: Leaps to target tile, damaging adjacent tiles on landing. Self-damage.
weapon.description: Jumps to a tile, dealing damage to all adjacent tiles. Takes 1 self-damage.

weapon.name: Unstable Cannon
weapon.targeting: Fires a high-damage projectile. Self-damage on fire.
weapon.description: High-damage cannon that damages self when firing.

weapon.name: Viscera Nanobots
weapon.targeting: Targets single unit. Deals damage to target and heals the mech if target dies.
weapon.description: Nanobots that damage target. Killing blow heals the Nano Mech.

upgrades.name: Heal on Kill
upgrades.effect: Heals ALL mechs when getting a kill

squads.name: Bombermechs
squads.description: AE squad. Spawns explosive bomblings that detonate on Vek. Pierce Mech shoots through units.

weapon.name: Piercing Shot
weapon.targeting: Fires a piercing projectile through all units in a line
weapon.description: Shoots through all units in a line, damaging each.

weapon.name: Bomb Dispenser
weapon.targeting: Deploys a Bombling unit that walks toward nearest Vek and detonates
weapon.description: Spawns a Bombling that autonomously moves toward and detonates on enemies.

upgrades.name: +1 Damage
upgrades.effect: Bomblings deal more damage on detonation

weapon.name: Exchange Device
weapon.targeting: Swaps the positions of two units
weapon.description: Swaps positions of two target units. Versatile repositioning tool.

squads.name: Arachnophiles
squads.description: AE squad. Creates allied Arachnoid units from killed Vek. Ricochet rocket and area slide.

weapon.name: Ricochet Rocket
weapon.targeting: Fires a projectile that bounces off the first target, continuing in a line to hit additional targets
weapon.description: Rocket that bounces off first target and continues hitting others in the line.

weapon.name: Arachnoid Injector
weapon.targeting: Artillery shot that creates an allied Arachnoid unit when it kills an enemy
weapon.description: Kills create allied Arachnoid units that damage and push enemies.

weapon.name: Area Shift
weapon.targeting: Pushes self and all surrounding units 1 tile in the chosen direction
weapon.description: Slides the mech and all adjacent units one tile in the same direction.

squads.name: Mist Eaters
squads.description: AE squad. Heals from smoke/clouds. Control Shot repositions enemies, Reverse Thrusters dash-damages.

weapon.name: Reverse Thrusters
weapon.targeting: Dashes forward, dealing damage and pushing targets. Also damages tiles behind the mech.
weapon.description: Charges forward, damaging in front and behind with thrusters.

weapon.name: Smog Blast
weapon.targeting: Fires an artillery shot that damages and creates smoke tiles
weapon.description: Artillery that damages target and creates smoke clouds for mist eating.

passive.name: Nanofilter Mending
passive.effect: Mechs heal 1 HP when entering or starting turn in smoke/cloud tiles
passive.description: Squad passive: mechs recover health from smoke.

weapon.name: Control Shot
weapon.targeting: Hits target and forces it to move in a direction of your choosing
weapon.description: Forces target to walk in a specified direction. Versatile repositioning.

squads.name: Heat Sinkers
squads.description: AE squad. Uses fire and Boost mechanic. Mechs gain Boost from fire tiles for +1 damage.

weapon.name: Heat Converter
weapon.targeting: Melee attack that deals damage. Consumes fire on mech's tile for extra effect.
weapon.description: Punches adjacent target. Absorbs fire for Boost bonus.

upgrades.name: Fire Trail
upgrades.effect: Leaves fire on tiles moved through

weapon.name: Quick-Fire Rockets
weapon.targeting: Fires rockets at all enemies in a line. Hits multiple targets.
weapon.description: Rockets that hit all targets in a straight line. Very high damage with Boost.

weapon.name: Napalm Launcher
weapon.targeting: Sets a line of tiles on fire
weapon.description: Creates a line of fire tiles, setting enemies and terrain ablaze.

upgrades.name: +1 Damage
upgrades.effect: Deals damage to units on fire tiles

squads.name: Cataclysm
squads.description: AE squad. Creates pits/chasms, destroys terrain. Pitcher throws enemies, Drill creates cracks, Triptych makes pits.

weapon.name: Giant Arm
weapon.targeting: Grabs adjacent unit and throws it several tiles in a direction
weapon.description: Picks up and throws adjacent unit, dealing damage on landing.

weapon.name: Triptych Strike
weapon.targeting: Hits 3 tiles in a pattern. Creates pits/chasms on empty tiles, damages units.
weapon.description: Strikes multiple tiles, cracking terrain into pits that kill ground units.

weapon.name: Seismic Drill
weapon.targeting: Drills adjacent tile, cracking surrounding ground on kills
weapon.description: Melee attack that cracks adjacent tiles when killing the target.

squads.name: Secret Squad
squads.description: Secret squad unlocked by completing all achievements. Contains unique Techno-Vek mechs.

weapon.name: Ramming Speed
weapon.targeting: Charges forward, damaging and pushing the first target
weapon.description: Dash attack similar to Beetle charge.

weapon.name: Stinger
weapon.targeting: Stabs an adjacent tile
weapon.description: Fast flying melee attack.

weapon.name: Accelerating Thorax
weapon.targeting: Fires an arcing projectile at a single tile
weapon.description: Artillery attack.

mech_classes.Prime: Close-range fighters. Can use Prime-class weapons without power penalty.
mech_classes.Brute: Durable fighters with charge/push mechanics. Can use Brute-class weapons without penalty.
mech_classes.Ranged: Artillery and ranged attackers. Can use Ranged-class weapons without penalty.
mech_classes.Science: Support mechs with utility abilities. Can use Science-class weapons without penalty.

class_weapon_penalty: Using a weapon from a different class costs +1 reactor core.

notes.reactor_cores: Each mech can install up to 9 reactor cores. Cores power weapons, upgrades, and passives.
notes.mech_repair: Any mech can repair for 1 HP instead of attacking. Removes Fire, Frozen, A.C.I.D.
notes.custom_squads: Players can mix any 3 unlocked mechs into a custom squad.
notes.weapon_swapping: Found weapons can replace starting weapons. Class matters for power cost.
